creator: cjr@cruwe.de
text:
For professional reasons (which I sincerely regret, I loved using FreeBSD), I stopped using FreeBSD on all machines save from firewalls. I do not use www/glassfish anymore and would kindly ask to be removed as maintainer and release www/glassfish back into the pool.

Many thanks for all the help I received on this channel and on the lists.
I hope to be able to return back sometime, cheers!
--
Christopher
